---
title: "Consolidation Exercises - Day3"
author: "Thiago Cordeiro-Almeida"
date: "2026-07-22"
output: pdf_document
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
```

All the code is available on my [github]()

# Exercise 1

![](images/Exercise_BarsInMadrid.png)

# Exercise 2

![](images/Exercise_LeftAtMargins.png)

# Exercise 3

I didn't have time to conclude.
